title: Object Assignment in C++
description: A flowchart illustrating the process and mechanics of assigning one object to another in C++, including member-wise copy and the role of the copy assignment operator.
relationships: Source object is on the right-hand side (RHS) of assignment
Target object is on the left-hand side (LHS) of assignment
Operator= performs member-wise copy of data
Shallow copy can lead to shared resources/dangling pointers
Deep copy is often required for correct behavior
